description: Operator reported: 'all these demos have this issue where the left nav pushes the detail container off the screen when resizing.' Diagnosis given this session (most likely causes ranked): (1) sidebar lacks `navigationSplitViewColumnWidth(min:ideal:max:)`, (2) detail lacks `.frame(minWidth: ...)`, (3) long unwrapped Text in sidebar row, (4) Spacer() in sidebar HStack, (5) WindowGroup missing `.windowResizability(.contentMinSize)` + `.defaultSize`. The 90% fix is one modifier on the sidebar + one on the detail + window resizability. Need: operator pointer to one specific demo (hello-world-google / desktop-utilities / clia-release / etc.) so I can grep for the missing modifier, patch it, verify the fix, then audit the others. Paused awaiting demo selection.
title: Audit demo apps for the NavigationSplitView sidebar pushing detail off-screen on resize
